title: PR Rework Assessment
description: Output format for the PR tasks stage. The coder lists which checks need code changes (rework) vs which were resolved via non-code actions.

rework_checks.description: Checks that require code changes to resolve. These will trigger an auto-move to clarification for a separate code rework flow.

name.description: Full check name as shown in the PR status checks (e.g. 'Code Checks', 'Simtest Status')

reason.description: Why this check requires code changes to resolve

touched_checks.description: Checks the coder took action on that do not require code changes (e.g. re-triggered a CI job, added a label, commented).

name.description: Full check name as shown in the PR status checks

action.description: What action the coder took (e.g. 're-triggered CI job', 'added label', 'commented on PR')

result.description: What happened as a result (e.g. 'job launched', 'label added', 'comment posted')
